text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Hm... This method would certainly<n>allow them to
train more efficiently<n>without adding physical
strain.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Going back to my earlier proposal, is<n>there
anything you'd like to—

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Apologies, I was just thinking about<n>how our
relationship has changed<n>since we first met.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I never would've imagined we'd<n>reach a point
where we could<n>exchange opinions like this...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I suppose a lot has happened since<n>then.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
The approach you take with your<n>racer has
reminded me of something<n>important.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I know you're not perfect, and<n>there's plenty I
would contend with<n>you...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But what I'm about to say is<n>genuinely how I
feel, Trainer<n><username>.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'm grateful to you. And I mean that<n>from the
bottom of my heart.
choice_data_list: I'm the one who should be thanking you.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Then I suppose we feel the same<n>way about
each other.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
We still have a long way to go before<n>we can
relax, but for now, why don't<n>we call it a day?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
We can invite <chrname>, Little Cocon,<n>and Bitter
Glasse out for dinner after<n>this.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
They're not the most social<n>butterflies out there,
but I'm sure<n>they'd be excited for a buffet.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Of course, there's no need to force<n>them. If they
decline, well...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It would still be nice for us adults to<n>enjoy a
relaxed meal together.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone quickly agrees to come,<n>and we spend
a fun-filled night<n>together.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone quickly agrees to come,<n>and we spend
a fun-filled night<n>together.
